description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and matching trousers. The suit jacket is tailored and fitted, with a visible collar and lapels, and the trousers are straight-cut. The figure's arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are open and relaxed. The shoes are formal and closed-toe, complementing the business attire. The face is clean-shaven with short, neatly styled hair, and the overall appearance is that of a professional individual. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure stands in a neutral, upright posture.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has short hair and wears formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit, collared shirt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight cut of the suit, and the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit jacket and trousers, with both arms extended and the back of the head visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the suit's side seam, and the right shoe.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tailored trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
